_comment: Project-scoped Claude Code settings. Hooks here are advisory guardrails for the anti-drift 'update ritual'. Adapt the command to match the hook setup you used on your previous project. CLAUDE.md carries the behavioral contract; these hooks add a deterministic nudge.

hooks.command: echo '[legenda] Session ending. Before you stop: is docs/PROJECT_STATUS.md updated to reflect what changed this session? If scope or a platform constraint changed, are SPECIFICATION.md / ARCHITECTURE.md updated too?'
